description: This is a configuration module for an application, defining a Settings dataclass that loads environment variables related to JWT, database URL, and CORS configuration. It includes functions to fetch environment variables with fallback options and a main function `get_settings()` that constructs the Settings object with validated and defaulted values.

classes.name: Settings
classes.description: Immutable dataclass for application configuration settings loaded from environment variables.

methods.name: str|None _env_first(*names: str)
methods.description: Fetches the first non-empty environment variable from given list of names.

methods.name: Settings get_settings()
methods.description: Loads and validates application settings from environment variables, returning a Settings object.
